value.reason: The cited page explicitly documents a `plan` permission mode for Claude Code (labeled "Plan mode" in the VS Code UI), described as allowing only reads — no file edits, shell commands, or executions — so the agent can research/explore before any changes are made. The cell label "Plan Mode" matches the provider's own UI label exactly. The cell description accurately captures the feature: Claude can research a task and propose changes without writing, editing, or executing anything, and the developer reviews before proceeding. This is distinct from the adjacent capabilities (subagents, multi-agent, workflows, autonomous iteration, parallel workspaces) — it is purely a permission/oversight mode. No invented claims are present.
